title: Add duplicate id checks and fix temp file randomness
description:
Two store/validate items from the audit:

1. **Duplicate id checks** — validate.ts checks for duplicate task and issue ids, but does NOT check for duplicate handoff, claim, prompt, or message ids. Add duplicate id detection for all record types.

2. **Temp file randomness** — store.ts:45 uses Math.random() for temp file names. Not CSPRNG. Use crypto.randomUUID() for strictly better uniqueness.
acceptance: writeJsonAtomic uses crypto.randomUUID() for temp file suffix.
